name: studio.get_credit_balance
description: Read the current Actium Studio credit balance for an account or site: remaining credits, consumption rate, projected depletion date.
whenToUse: Cost-aware planning: before starting an LLM-heavy flow (e.g. studio.scaffold_site), confirm the account has enough credit.
Operator dashboard: surface current credit balance so the operator can refill before a scheduled campaign burns through it.
Threshold alerts: scheduled check that surfaces a warning when balance drops below a configured floor.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants cost per individual tool invocation — this skill reports account balance, not per-call cost breakdowns.
Caller wants to purchase credits or update a payment method — out of scope; operator console handles billing writes.
Caller wants a month-over-month trend — use studio.get_billing_overview; credit balance is a point-in-time snapshot.
